name: Dark Fudge Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heavy saucepan, melt the chocolate and butter over low heat, stirring frequently.
2. Stir in sugar, corn syrup, and 2/3 of the half-and-half. Continue stirring until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Simmer for 4 minutes without stirring; set aside to cool slightly.
4. In a small bowl, beat the eggs until well blended.
5. Stir in the hot chocolate mixture (from step 3) into the beaten eggs.
6. Add egg mixture to the remaining chocolate mixture. Cook and stir over medium heat until just thickened, about 1 minute.
7. Cool the mixture to lukewarm temperature.
8. Stir in vanilla extract, whipping cream, and the rest of the half-and-half.
9. Pour the mixture into an ice-cream maker and freeze according to the manufacturer's directions.
